theme: Fewest tile types to self-assemble a shape
title: Ripple Window: Minimum Tile Types for a Counting Rectangle
strategies: per-cell tiling: one bespoke, unshared tile type for every grid cell -- always correct, O(n*W) types

row-tagged cooperative counter: a fresh 4-type south+west ripple-carry gadget instantiated per bit row (plus a per-row column-0 filler and a row-0 LSB flip-flop) -- O(W) = O(log n) types, misses that the gadget is row-independent

position-invariant cooperative counter: the SAME 4-type ripple-carry gadget reused at every interior row (temperature-2 south+west cooperative binding), plus 2 boundary types for row 0 and 1 for column 0 -- O(1) types regardless of n or W
any other temperature-2 tile system a solver's program derives that still assembles the exact target window
